Stops an automation before its next step: Stops an automation before its next steps unless it has been published, so test runs never trigger your real actions.
Only lets the steps below run when this: Only lets the steps below run when this automation is published. Otherwise it stops the run so nothing below executes.
Place every step you only want to run on:
Place every step you only want to run on the **published** automation **below** this one.

While you are building or testing, those steps are skipped automatically.
When should the steps below run?: When should the steps below run?
